programs.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programs.desc: (M) Older bachelor Michael falls for alluring psychic Janis, who sees him as an easy mark for a con. But Michael's concerned relative, Virginia, threatens to expose Janis's motives.

programs.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programs.desc: (M) An American exchange student in Paris falls for her host family's son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that changes their lives forever.
